response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and versatile Staff Software Engineer with strong backend and distributed systems expertise. However, he lacks the executive leadership background, experience scaling engineering organizations, and deep, production-grade multi-agent AI architecture experience required for this CTO role.
strengths: Extensive backend and distributed systems experience, including handling high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Relevant fintech and financial systems exposure from his time at RIDE Capital and pricing optimization at Optilyz.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Lacks executive-level engineering leadership experience and has no track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
AI agent experience appears limited to a recent 6-month stint focusing on tooling, rather than architecting complex, stateful production systems.
No evidence of managing hybrid engineering models, outsourced teams, or technical governance at an organizational scale.
